description: Create ClickHouse client singleton with env-based configuration in src/lib/clickhouse.ts
Create idempotent migration script (scripts/migrate.ts + scripts/schema.sql) for database and tables
Add concurrently dev script and predev hook to start ClickHouse and Next.js together
Implement identity resolution logic in src/lib/identity.ts with mapping insert and conflict detection
Implement POST /api/events route for single event ingestion with identity resolution
Implement POST /api/events/batch route for bulk event ingestion
Implement GET /api/events/list route with cursor pagination, event name and resolved_id filters
Implement GET /api/schema route with event names, property names, and inferred types from sampling
Implement in-memory schema cache with 60-second TTL in src/lib/schema-cache.ts
Implement GET /api/trends route with count, unique_users, and numeric aggregation measures
Implement breakdown and breakdown_limit support in GET /api/trends
Implement POST /api/funnels route with ordered step conversion using resolved identities
Implement GET /api/users route with search and cursor pagination
Implement GET /api/users/[id] route returning profile, identity cluster, and event timeline
Implement seed data generator in src/lib/seed.ts with 70 users, 12k events, and 6 event types
Implement POST /api/seed and GET /api/seed/status routes
Implement GET /api/live SSE route polling ClickHouse for new events every second
Build MUI navigation shell with persistent left sidebar and route links in layout.tsx
Build dashboard home page with headline metrics: total events, total users, top event last 7 days
Build Event Explorer page at /explore with event table, filters, and cursor-based infinite scroll
Build JsonChip and IdentityChip shared UI components
Build Trends page at /trends with event, measure, granularity, and date range selectors
Build TrendChart component with Recharts LineChart and chart type switcher (Line/Bar/Area/Table)
Build Funnels page at /funnels with 2-5 step builder, date range, and horizontal funnel bar chart
Build User search page at /users with search input and results list
Build User profile page at /users/[id] with identity cluster chips and event timeline
Build Testing page left panel with quick-fire buttons and custom event form at /test
Build Testing page right panel with SSE-powered live event feed, pause/resume, and status indicator
Implement POST /api/generate/start route with streaming batch insert job using in-memory job store
Implement GET /api/generate/[job_id]/status SSE, POST cancel, and GET /api/generate/jobs routes
Build Bulk Generator page at /generate with config form, preset templates, and progress panel
Write Vitest unit tests for identity resolution against real ClickHouse (minipanel_test database)
Write Playwright e2e tests for test page, explorer, trends, funnels, and identity flows
